module:model/AccountSettingsInformation

module:model/AccountSettingsInformation

Constructs a new AccountSettingsInformation.
Contains account settings information.

Methods

(static) constructFromObject(data, obj) → {module:model/AccountSettingsInformation}

Source:
  • model/AccountSettingsInformation.js, line 54

Constructs a AccountSettingsInformation from a plain JavaScript object, optionally creating a new instance.
Copies all relevant properties from data to obj if supplied or a new instance if not.

Parameters:
Name Type Description
data Object

The plain JavaScript object bearing properties of interest.
obj module:model/AccountSettingsInformation

Optional instance to populate.
Returns:

The populated AccountSettingsInformation instance.

Type
module:model/AccountSettingsInformation
